---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve. "I'm frustrated when..." -->


## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see. -->


## Alternative Approaches
<!-- List any alternative solutions or features you considered. -->


## Impact / Motivation
<!-- Why is this valuable? Who benefits from it? How often is this needed? -->


## Implementation Notes
<!-- Optional: Any technical notes, constraints, or suggested approach. -->


## Additional Context
<!-- Add any mockups, screenshots, or links to similar implementations. -->
